info.title: Traigent Audit Contract (registered routes)
info.description: Documented Flask audit routes registered in TraigentBackend/src/routes/audit_routes.py. V1: minimal path + method declarations to satisfy the cross-repo conformance gate. Full request/response schemas, query-parameter validation, and pagination definitions are follow-up authoring work (Batch 3c). Codex review of Batch 3: response codes replaced with `default` until each handler is traced; this prevents the OpenAPI from contradicting actual handler returns.

200.description: Active audit alert rollup with canonical `data`, dashboard `alerts` alias, static threshold configuration, and observed 24-hour metrics.

500.description: Failure path from the standard error envelope used by the backend handler.

get.summary: Get audit-pipeline health (logging backend reachable, retention healthy)

200.description: Health snapshot for the audit pipeline: rolling counters, warnings, and an ISO-8601 timestamp.

500.description: Failure path — backend returns `success=false` with `error` and `message`; same schema covers both paths.

default.description: Response shape pending — see Flask handler in TraigentBackend/src/routes/ for actual return shape; full request/response schemas tracked as follow-up.
Response shape pending — see Flask handler in TraigentBackend/src/routes/ for actual return shape; full request/response schemas tracked as follow-up.

get.summary: Get a specific audit log entry by id

default.description: Response shape pending — see Flask handler in TraigentBackend/src/routes/ for actual return shape; full request/response schemas tracked as follow-up.

200.description: Retention policies with canonical `data` list and a `policies` alias for dashboard consumers.

get.summary: List security incidents derived from audit signal

200.description: Security incidents in the requested window with a severity-rollup summary.

get.summary: Generate a SOC2 compliance report from audit history

default.description: Response shape pending — see Flask handler in TraigentBackend/src/routes/ for actual return shape; full request/response schemas tracked as follow-up.

200.description: Alias of /api/v1/audit/security/incidents kept for SOC2 clients — same response shape.

get.summary: Aggregate audit-log statistics (counts by category, etc.)

200.description: Audit statistics for a requested time window: summary counts, event-type counts, and ISO-8601 date range.

500.description: Failure path from the standard error envelope used by the backend handler.
